## Source plugin: `isoimage_isohybrid`

Creates a hybrid bootable ISO image that supports both legacy BIOS (syslinux) and EFI (GRUB) booting. The resulting image can be written to optical media or USB.

Common usage:

```
part /boot --source isoimage_isohybrid --sourceparams="loader=grub-efi,image_name=IsoImage" --ondisk cd --label LIVECD
```
